description: Letter, probably. In Hebrew. On one side there is a poem (panegyric?). On the other side there is the lower part of an elaborate letter, perhaps a letter of gratitude. Refers to "the salvation that occurred in Tishrei 1428 Seleucid" (=1116 CE). Ends with the phrase/motto "Yeshaʿ Rav." (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מכתב בעברית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
